title: taraxacum koelzii
intro: Taraxacum koelzii, also known as Koelz's dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible leaves. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum koelzii include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum koelzii can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
